ohtani.title: Freeman hits 100th homer as a Dodger in 3-1 win
ohtani.blurb: Freddie Freeman hits his 100th home run as a Dodger and Emmet Sheehan strikes out seven in the Dodgers' 3-1 win over the Braves

imanaga.title: Cubs use seven-run 4th to win ninth straight game
imanaga.blurb: Cubs score seven runs in the bottom of the 4th to propel them to their ninth straight victory and 15th straight win at home

suzuki.title: Busch, Suzuki lead the Cubs to a 7-1 win
suzuki.blurb: Michael Busch belts a three-run double and Seiya Suzuki crushes a two-run home run leading the Cubs to a 7-1 win over the Rangers

yoshida.title: Connelly Early shuts down Rays in Red Sox's 2-0 win
yoshida.blurb: Connelly Early twirls seven scoreless innings and the Red Sox get home runs from Ceddane Rafaela and Wilyer Abreu to beat the Rays, 2-0

okamoto.title: Cease's 10 K's, Okamoto lead Blue Jays' 2-0 victory
okamoto.blurb: Dylan Cease strikes out 10 over seven scoreless innings and Kazuma Okamoto records an RBI single in the Blue Jays' 2-0 win over the Angels

murakami.title: Luke Raley homers twice in Mariners' 12-8 win
murakami.blurb: Luke Raley crushes a grand slam as part of a two-homer game, lifting the Mariners to a 12-8 win vs. the White Sox

matsui.title: Michael McGreevy twirls a gem in Cardinals' win
matsui.blurb: JJ Wetherholt hits a four-run single and Michael McGreevy twirls a gem in the Cardinals' 6-0 win over the Padres
